original_statement: from team europe, who was the player to play in the match after mika koivuniemi?
mutated_statement: from team europe, who was the player to play in the match both immediately after and immediately before the preceding participant?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Temporal relation expansion + Quantifier/coordination addition + Semantic ambiguity/contradiction: Named entity "mika koivuniemi" → generic "the preceding participant" | temporal relation "after" → "both immediately after and immediately before" (adds "immediately before" and coordinates with "immediately after") | introduces logical contradiction/ambiguity (someone cannot be both immediately before and after the same participant) (mika koivuniemi → the preceding participant; after → both immediately after and immediately before)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据日志可见judge_thought字段为空且多次critique集中指出“simple_query()为非许可函数/函数使用错误”，但未提到或识别问题中的时间关系矛盾（“既在前又在后”）。Agent在多次迭代中持续重复调用同一不支持的操作(simple_query)，没有提出澄清请求或将问题改写为可解形式，表现为机械式重复尝试（形式化执行而非语义澄清）。因此归类为“无法意识到指令矛盾”，因为其行为符合条目5中“不识别矛盾并被动探索/形式化执行”的描述。
